PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Nov-17-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Nancy Lofdahl for and with Jerry Ferraz.

Ms. Lofdahl argued that her client was nominated in the will and stated that Ms. Osborne's interest would be protected by Court supervision. Ms. Osborne stated that she was objecting to Mr. Ferraz's valuation of the estate and stated that the matter should not be probated as the value of the estate was less $100,000.00. The Parties met outside the courtroom but were unsuccessful in coming to an agreement. After hearing argument, the Court granted the petition appointing Jerry Ferraz as the Executor of the estate of Tony Vaughn (upon review of the order).

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harris.
